name: Dapagliflozin And Sitagliptine Phosphate Tablets
about: Dapagliflozin And Sitagliptine Phosphate Tablets are a combination medicine used to treat type 2 diabetes. Dapagliflozin works by removing excess glucose from the body through urine, while Sitagliptine helps increase insulin production and reduce glucose production in the liver. These tablets are taken orally as per the doctors suggestion and come in a solid dosage form. They are manufactured in India and belong to the category of general medicines. It is important to store them in a dry place to maintain their efficacy. These tablets are available in the market through exporters, suppliers, and traders.

faq.q: What is the use of Dapagliflozin And Sitagliptine Phosphate Tablets?
faq.a: These tablets are used to treat type 2 diabetes by controlling blood sugar levels.

faq.q: How should I take these tablets?
faq.a: These tablets should be taken orally as per the suggestion of your doctor.

faq.q: What is the dosage form of these tablets?
faq.a: The dosage form of these tablets is solid.

faq.q: What is the origin of these tablets?
faq.a: These tablets are manufactured in India.

faq.q: How should I store these tablets?
faq.a: These tablets should be stored in a dry place to maintain their efficacy.
